results.rendered_html:
upaśāyin a.
1 Lying near to.
2 Sleeping, going to bed.
3 Allaying, calming.
4 Composing or narcotic (in medicine); ˚tā, -tvaṃ tranquilling; calming, secondary means of cure (as diet &c.).
